navigation_overview: Parabank is a sample banking application. When visitors arrive, they see the sign-in page, which offers an Email / Username and Password form, a Register link for new customers, and a Forgot Password? link for credential recovery. After a successful log-in, users reach their account dashboard displaying every account and balance. The left-hand navigation menu now contains the following options: ① Accounts Overview (default dashboard view), ② Open New Account, ③ Transfer Funds, ④ Bill Pay, ⑤ Request Loan, ⑥ Update Contact Info, ⑦ Manage Cards, ⑧ Investments, ⑨ Account Statements, ⑩ Security Settings, ⑪ Support Center, and ⑫ Log Out.

module_summaries.summary:
Line 1: Users can sign in with email/username and password or access the Forgot Password flow.
Line 2: Displays the login form, validation errors, and authentication result messages (e.g., "Signed in successfully.").

Line 1: Users can create a new customer account by submitting the full registration form.
Line 2: Displays registration fields, inline validation errors, and registration success/confirmation messages.

Line 1: Users can view an accounts dashboard listing all customer accounts and totals.
Line 2: Displays masked account numbers, account type, current balance, account status badges, open date, and total balance footer.

Line 1: Users can open a new Checking or Savings account by selecting type, entering an initial deposit, and choosing a funding source.
Line 2: Displays account type cards with features/minimums, deposit and funding-account fields, real-time validation errors, and success confirmation.

Line 1: Users can transfer funds internally between their accounts or initiate external transfers by entering destination account details.
Line 2: Displays transfer type options, source/destination fields, transfer amount, validation errors, and transfer result with balance updates.

Line 1: Users can submit bill payments by entering payee details, account numbers, payment amount, and selecting a source account.
Line 2: Displays payee and payment fields, validation errors, payment confirmation with reference code, and updated account balances.

Line 1: Users can apply for Personal, Auto, or Home loans by selecting loan type, entering loan and down payment amounts and choosing collateral.
Line 2: Displays loan type cards with interest rates, allowed amount ranges, collateral selection, validation feedback, and approval/denial result.

Line 1: Users can edit and update their contact information via a pre-filled profile form and submit changes.
Line 2: Displays pre-filled contact fields (name, address, phone), inline validation errors, and profile update confirmation.

Line 1: Users can request new debit/credit cards and manage existing card controls (limits, travel notices, freeze/unfreeze).
Line 2: Displays card request and control forms, existing card list and statuses, request tracking IDs, and confirmation messages.

Line 1: Users can view a portfolio snapshot and execute buy or sell trades for funds using the trade form.
Line 2: Displays read-only holdings, market value and unrealised gain/loss, plus trade inputs and trade execution results/validation.

Line 1: Users can generate account statements for a selected period and set e-statement (paperless) preferences.
Line 2: Displays statement period/account inputs, retrieved transaction lists on success, and e-statement preference/email settings.

Line 1: Users can change their account password by entering current and new password values and submitting the form.
Line 2: Displays the change-password fields, validation errors for strength/mismatch, and success/failure messages.

Line 1: Users can send secure support messages (with optional attachment) and request scheduled callbacks with preferred date/time.
Line 2: Displays message and callback forms, category/reason selectors, inline validation, and ticket/callback confirmation IDs.

test_cases.title: Sign in with valid email and password
test_cases.workflow: Submit the form and validate the provided credentials against the registered-user database
test_cases.preconditions: A registered user exists with a valid email and password
steps: Fill all required fields (Email/Username with a valid email address, Password with a valid password meeting complexity rules)
Click "Sign In"
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Accounts Overview page and the system flashes "Signed in successfully."

test_cases.title: Sign in with valid username and password
test_cases.workflow: Submit the form and validate the provided credentials against the registered-user database
test_cases.preconditions: A registered user exists with a username and password
steps: Fill all required fields (Email/Username with a valid username, Password with a valid password meeting complexity rules)
Click "Sign In"
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Accounts Overview page and the system flashes "Signed in successfully."

test_cases.title: Sign in with incorrect credentials shows error and clears password
test_cases.workflow: Submit the form and validate the provided credentials against the registered-user database
test_cases.preconditions: A registered user exists
steps: Fill all required fields (Email/Username with a registered email or username, Password with an incorrect password)
Click "Sign In"
test_cases.expected_result: System shows the authentication error message, clears the password field, and allows another attempt.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Incorrect email or password. Please try again,

test_cases.title: Post-logout redirect to login when revisiting previous authenticated page
test_cases.preconditions: User account exists and user can log in
steps: Log in to the application using valid credentials
Navigate to a protected page (e.g., Accounts Overview) and note the page URL
Click the application's Logout control
Attempt to navigate to the noted protected page URL (paste into address bar or click a bookmarked link)
test_cases.expected_result: The application redirects to the login page (or shows the login form) instead of granting access to the protected content

test_cases.title: Browser back button after logout does not show authenticated content
test_cases.preconditions: User is able to log in and reach an authenticated page
steps: Log in with valid credentials and navigate to an authenticated page (e.g., Accounts Overview)
Click Logout in the application
Press the browser Back button once or more to attempt to return to the previously viewed page
test_cases.expected_result: Browser does not display cached authenticated content; user is shown the login page or an explicit logged-out state (no account data visible)

test_cases.title: Submitting a form after forced session expiry shows expiry notice or redirects to login
test_cases.preconditions: User can log in and access a multi-step form (e.g., Transfer Funds or Update Contact Info)
steps: Log in and open a multi-field form (e.g., start a Transfer Funds or Update Contact Info flow)
Simulate session expiry by clearing the site's session/authentication cookies from the browser developer tools or by waiting until the session timeout elapses
Attempt to submit the form after the session has been invalidated
test_cases.expected_result: The application prevents the action and either shows a session-expired message instructing the user to log in again or redirects the user to the login page before processing the submission

test_cases.title: Password reset link expires and shows an error when used after expiry
test_cases.preconditions: Password reset functionality is available and reset links are time-limited
steps: On the login page request a password reset for a valid account and capture the reset link sent to the account email
Wait until the documented reset-link expiry window has passed (or use a test mailbox entry that is older than the expiry window)
Open the expired reset link in a browser and attempt to set a new password
test_cases.expected_result: The application rejects the expired reset link and displays an appropriate message indicating the link has expired or is invalid; it does not allow setting a new password using the expired token

test_cases.title: After changing password the old password no longer works
test_cases.preconditions: User can log in and access the change-password flow
steps: Log in with the current credentials and perform a password change using the application's password change flow (provide current password, set a new password)
Log out from the application
Attempt to log in using the previous (old) password, then attempt to log in using the new password
test_cases.expected_result: Login with the old password fails (authentication denied); login with the new password succeeds, confirming the old password no longer authenticates

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.workflow: Submit the form and validate the provided credentials against the registered-user database
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Sign In"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Email/Username is required

test_cases.title: Submit with invalid email format
test_cases.workflow: Submit the form and validate the provided credentials against the registered-user database
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields (Email/Username with an invalid email format, Password with a valid password)
Click "Sign In"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown indicating invalid email format and sign-in is prevented.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Email must be a valid email format

test_cases.title: Submit with password not meeting complexity requirements
test_cases.workflow: Submit the form and validate the provided credentials against the registered-user database
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields (Email/Username with a valid email or username, Password that does not meet complexity requirements)
Click "Sign In"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown indicating password does not meet complexity requirements and sign-in is prevented.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

test_cases.title: Page refresh on authenticated page retains logged-in state
test_cases.preconditions: User can log in and reach an authenticated page
steps: Log in with valid credentials and navigate to an authenticated page (e.g., Accounts Overview)
Click the browser Refresh/Reload button or press F5 to reload the page
test_cases.expected_result: After refresh the user remains authenticated and the authenticated content (account details, user name, etc.) is still visible without requiring a new login

test_cases.title: Forgot-password displays clear error for an unregistered email
test_cases.preconditions: Tester has access to the Forgot Password form on the login page
steps: On the login page open the Forgot Password/Reset form
Enter an email address that is not registered in the application (e.g., noaccount@example.com) and submit the form
test_cases.expected_result: The application displays a clear, user-facing error indicating the email address is not registered (not a silent success or ambiguous message)

test_cases.title: Sign in with password exactly at minimum length meeting complexity
test_cases.workflow: Submit the form and validate the provided credentials against the registered-user database
test_cases.preconditions: A registered user exists with a password exactly at the minimum length meeting complexity
steps: Fill all required fields (Email/Username with a valid credential, Password exactly at the minimum length and including required character types)
Click "Sign In"
test_cases.expected_result: Authentication succeeds and the system flashes "Signed in successfully." with redirect to Accounts Overview.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

test_cases.title: Submit with password one character below minimum length
test_cases.workflow: Submit the form and validate the provided credentials against the registered-user database
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields (Email/Username with a valid credential, Password one character shorter than the required minimum)
Click "Sign In"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown indicating the password does not meet the minimum length/complexity and sign-in is prevented.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

test_cases.title: Register successfully with valid required data
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values (First Name, Last Name, Street Address, City, State, ZIP Code (5-digit), Phone Number, Social Security Number, Username as a valid email, Password meeting length requirement, Confirm Password matching Password)
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Account created successfully; user is redirected to the login page and prompted to sign in.

test_cases.title: Register successfully using ZIP Code in 5+4 format
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values using a ZIP Code in 5+4 format (ZIP+4)
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Account created successfully and user is redirected to the login page.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: validates field completeness, pattern conformance, and password match

test_cases.title: Register with invalid email format for Username
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, enter an invalid email in the Username field
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error displayed for Username indicating an invalid email format.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Username must be a valid email format

test_cases.title: Register with Password shorter than minimum length
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, enter a Password shorter than the minimum length and repeat the same short value in Confirm Password
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the password does not meet the minimum length requirement.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Password must be at least 8 characters

test_cases.title: Register with mismatched Confirm Password
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values, enter a valid Password and enter a different value in Confirm Password
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Confirm Password must match the Password field.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Confirm Password must match the Password field

test_cases.title: Register with invalid ZIP Code format
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, enter a ZIP Code that does not match allowed formats
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown for ZIP Code indicating the acceptable formats.
test_cases.spec_evidence: ZIP Code must be 5 digits or 5+4 format (12345 or 12345-6789)

test_cases.title: Register with invalid Phone Number format
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, enter a Phone Number that does not conform to the required pattern
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown for Phone Number indicating the required format.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Phone Number must follow the format (123) 456-7890 with automatic formatting

test_cases.title: Register with invalid SSN format
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, enter an SSN that does not match the required pattern
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown for SSN indicating the required format.
test_cases.spec_evidence: SSN must follow the format 123-45-6789 with automatic formatting

test_cases.title: Phone Number field auto-formats digits into required pattern
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Enter only digits into the Phone Number field (unformatted)
Move focus away from the Phone Number field
test_cases.expected_result: Phone Number is automatically formatted to the required pattern in the field.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Phone Number is automatically formatted to (123) 456-7890

test_cases.title: SSN field auto-formats digits into required pattern
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Enter only digits into the Social Security Number field (unformatted)
Move focus away from the Social Security Number field
test_cases.expected_result: SSN is automatically formatted to the required pattern in the field.
test_cases.spec_evidence: SSN is automatically formatted to 123-45-6789

test_cases.title: Welcome message shows the user's name
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview page is visible.
steps: Locate the welcome message area on the Accounts Overview page
Verify the welcome message includes the logged-in user's name
test_cases.expected_result: Welcome message displays the user's name.

test_cases.title: Accounts table displays expected columns in each row
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview page is visible.
steps: Locate the accounts table on the page
Verify each table row shows Account Number (clickable but not implemented yet), Account Type, Current Balance, Account Status (Active badge), and Open Date
test_cases.expected_result: Every row contains Account Number, Account Type, Current Balance, Account Status (Active badge), and Open Date.

test_cases.title: Footer displays the total balance across all accounts
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview page is visible with at least one account row.
steps: Read the Current Balance value from each account row and compute their sum
Compare the computed sum to the footer row's displayed total balance
test_cases.expected_result: Footer total balance equals the sum of all Current Balance values shown in the table.

test_cases.title: Rows ordered by account creation date (earliest first)
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview page is visible with multiple accounts having Open Dates.
steps: Inspect the Open Date values in the table rows from top to bottom
Verify the sequence of Open Date values is in ascending order (earliest first)
test_cases.expected_result: Table rows are ordered by account creation date with the earliest open date first.

test_cases.title: Direct URL access to protected page while logged out redirects to login
test_cases.preconditions: Tester is logged out (no active session) and has the direct URL for the Accounts Overview page
steps: Ensure the browser session is logged out (clear site cookies or use a fresh private window)
Enter the direct URL for the Accounts Overview page in the address bar and navigate to it
test_cases.expected_result: The application redirects to the login page (or displays the login form) instead of showing the Accounts Overview content

test_cases.title: Account numbers are masked showing only last four digits
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview page is visible.
steps: Locate the Account Number values in the table
Verify each Account Number is masked for security, displaying only the last four digits
test_cases.expected_result: All Account Number values are masked except for the last four digits (e.g., ****1234).

test_cases.title: Clicking Account Number shows no implemented navigation (Account Number is clickable but not implemented yet)
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview page is visible.
steps: Click an Account Number value in any table row
Observe the page behavior after the click
test_cases.expected_result: Clicking the Account Number does not navigate away or perform an implemented action; the user remains on the Accounts Overview page or sees a not-implemented indication.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Account Number is clickable but not implemented yet

test_cases.title: Open a new Checking account with valid initial deposit
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Open New Account page is open.
steps: Select Account type = Checking and fill all required fields (Initial Deposit Amount: valid amount above checking minimum, Funding Source Account: account with sufficient balance)
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: "Account opened successfully!" is displayed and user is redirected to accounts overview; the new checking account appears in the accounts listing.

test_cases.title: Open a new Savings account with valid initial deposit
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Open New Account page is open.
steps: Select Account type = Savings and fill all required fields (Initial Deposit Amount: valid amount above savings minimum, Funding Source Account: account with sufficient balance)
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: "Account opened successfully!" is displayed and user is redirected to accounts overview; the new savings account appears in the accounts listing.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Open New Account page is open.
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: System displays real-time validation errors

test_cases.title: Submit with Account type not selected
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Open New Account page is open.
steps: Fill all other required fields (Initial Deposit Amount: valid amount, Funding Source Account: selected), leave Account type unselected
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating account type must be selected.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Account type must be selected

test_cases.title: Submit with Initial Deposit Amount empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Open New Account page is open.
steps: Fill all other required fields (select Account type, Funding Source Account), leave Initial Deposit Amount empty
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Initial Deposit Amount is required and must be numeric.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Initial Deposit Amount must be numeric

test_cases.title: Submit with Funding Source Account not selected
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Open New Account page is open.
steps: Fill all other required fields (select Account type, Initial Deposit Amount: valid amount), leave Funding Source Account unselected
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating a funding source must be selected or that funding is insufficient.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Funding Source Account must have sufficient balance

test_cases.title: Enter non-numeric Initial Deposit Amount
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Open New Account page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields with valid selections except enter a non-numeric value into Initial Deposit Amount
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: Real-time or submission validation error indicating Initial Deposit Amount must be numeric.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Initial Deposit Amount must be numeric

test_cases.title: Initial Deposit below minimum for Checking
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Open New Account page is open.
steps: Select Account type = Checking and fill all required fields (Initial Deposit Amount: amount below checking minimum, Funding Source Account: account with sufficient balance)
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Initial Deposit Amount does not meet the checking minimum.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Initial Deposit Amount must meet minimums ($25 for Checking, $100 for Savings)

test_cases.title: Initial Deposit below minimum for Savings
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Open New Account page is open.
steps: Select Account type = Savings and fill all required fields (Initial Deposit Amount: amount below savings minimum, Funding Source Account: account with sufficient balance)
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Initial Deposit Amount does not meet the savings minimum.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Initial Deposit Amount must meet minimums ($25 for Checking, $100 for Savings)

test_cases.title: Funding Source Account has insufficient balance
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Open New Account page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields with a valid deposit amount and select a Funding Source Account whose balance is less than the entered deposit
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the selected funding source does not have sufficient balance.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Funding Source Account must have sufficient balance

test_cases.title: Real-time validation appears and clears for Initial Deposit field
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Open New Account page is open.
steps: Enter a non-numeric value into Initial Deposit Amount and observe validation feedback
Replace with a valid numeric amount meeting the applicable minimum and observe the validation feedback clears
test_cases.expected_result: Validation messages for the Initial Deposit field appear in real-time when invalid input is entered and clear when corrected without form submission.
test_cases.spec_evidence: System displays real-time validation errors

test_cases.title: Open Checking account with deposit equal to minimum
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Open New Account page is open.
steps: Select Account type = Checking and fill all required fields (Initial Deposit Amount: amount equal to checking minimum, Funding Source Account: account with sufficient balance)
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: "Account opened successfully!" is displayed and user is redirected to accounts overview; the new checking account appears in the accounts listing.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Initial Deposit Amount must meet minimums ($25 for Checking, $100 for Savings)

test_cases.title: Open Savings account with deposit equal to minimum
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Open New Account page is open.
steps: Select Account type = Savings and fill all required fields (Initial Deposit Amount: amount equal to savings minimum, Funding Source Account: account with sufficient balance)
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: "Account opened successfully!" is displayed and user is redirected to accounts overview; the new savings account appears in the accounts listing.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Initial Deposit Amount must meet minimums ($25 for Checking, $100 for Savings)

test_cases.title: Successful internal transfer between own accounts
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in, Transfer Funds page is open, and user has at least two own accounts (Checking or Savings) with sufficient balance
steps: Select the radio button for internal transfer (My ParaBank Account)

Fill all required fields (select Source Account from the Source Account dropdown, select Destination internal account from the destination options, enter a valid Transfer Amount within available balance)
Click the "Transfer" or "Submit" button
test_cases.expected_result: Confirmation message "Transfer completed successfully." is displayed and a transaction ID is shown for the transfer.

test_cases.title: Successful external transfer to matching account number
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in, Transfer Funds page is open, and user has a Checking or Savings account with sufficient balance
steps: Select the radio button for external transfer (External Account)

Fill all required fields (select Source Account from the Source Account dropdown, enter Destination Account Number, enter Confirm Account Number matching the Destination Account Number, enter a valid Transfer Amount within available balance)
Click the "Transfer" or "Submit" button
test_cases.expected_result: Confirmation message "Transfer completed successfully." is displayed and a transaction ID is shown for the transfer.

test_cases.title: Transfer fails when insufficient funds
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in, Transfer Funds page is open, and Source Account has a known available balance
steps: Select appropriate transfer type and fill all required fields (select Source Account, select or enter Destination, enter a Transfer Amount greater than the Source Account available balance)
Click the "Transfer" or "Submit" button
test_cases.expected_result: A contextual error indicating insufficient funds is displayed and the transfer is not completed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Failures display contextual errors such as "Insufficient funds"

test_cases.title: Destination options update when changing transfer type
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Transfer Funds page is open
steps: Select the radio button for internal transfer (My ParaBank Account)
Verify destination shows selectable own accounts
Select the radio button for external transfer (External Account)
Verify destination changes to input fields for account number and confirm account number
test_cases.expected_result: Destination options change based on the selected transfer type.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Transfer Funds page is open
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click the "Transfer" or "Submit" button
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates transfer amount

test_cases.title: External transfer fails when account numbers do not match
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Transfer Funds page is open
steps: Select the radio button for external transfer (External Account)
Fill all required fields (select Source Account, enter Destination Account Number, enter a non-matching Confirm Account Number, enter a valid Transfer Amount)
Click the "Transfer" or "Submit" button
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error displayed stating that the account numbers do not match and the transfer is not processed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Account numbers do not match.

test_cases.title: Source Account dropdown shows only Checking and Savings accounts
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in, Transfer Funds page is open, and user has multiple account types including Checking or Savings and at least one non-checking/savings account
steps: Open the Source Account dropdown on the Transfer Funds page
Inspect the list of accounts presented in the dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: The Source Account dropdown lists only Checking and Savings accounts for selection.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Source Account dropdown is filtered to Checking and Savings accounts only

test_cases.title: Reject transfer when transfer amount format is invalid
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Transfer Funds page is open
steps: Select appropriate transfer type and fill all other required fields correctly (select Source Account, select or enter Destination, enter an invalid-format value into the Transfer Amount field)
Click the "Transfer" or "Submit" button
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown for the Transfer Amount field indicating invalid amount format and the transfer is blocked.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates transfer amount

test_cases.title: Submit valid payment and verify reference code and balance update
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and the Submit Payment form is open
steps: Fill all required fields (Payee Name, Street Address, City, State, ZIP Code, Phone Number, Payee Account Number, Confirm Account Number) with matching valid values and a valid payee contact
Fill Payment Amount with an amount less than the selected source account's available balance and select a Source Account from the dropdown
Click "Pay"
test_cases.expected_result: Payment submitted successfully and a reference code is displayed; the source account balance is reduced accordingly and updated on the page.

test_cases.title: Fail submission when payee account numbers do not match
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and the Submit Payment form is open
steps: Fill all required fields (Payee Name, Street Address, City, State, ZIP Code, Phone Number, Payee Account Number, Confirm Account Number) with valid values but enter non-matching values for Payee Account Number and Confirm Account Number
Fill Payment Amount with an amount less than the selected source account's available balance and select a Source Account
Click "Pay"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error indicating the account numbers do not match is displayed and the form remains editable for correction.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Account numbers do not match

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and the Submit Payment form is open
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Pay"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: All entries are validated on submission

test_cases.title: Submit payment when amount equals available funds (boundary)
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and the Submit Payment form is open with knowledge of the source account's available balance
steps: Fill all required fields (Payee Name, Street Address, City, State, ZIP Code, Phone Number, Payee Account Number, Confirm Account Number) with matching valid values
Fill Payment Amount to exactly match the selected source account's available balance and select that Source Account
Click "Pay"
test_cases.expected_result: Payment is executed successfully and the source account balance is updated to reflect the zero (or new) available balance after the transaction.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Available funds are checked

test_cases.title: Request a Personal loan with valid inputs
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Select Loan Type = Personal and fill all required fields (Loan Amount within personal range, Down Payment at or above minimum percentage but less than Loan Amount, select Collateral Account with sufficient funds, choose Interest rate)
Click "Submit Loan Request"
test_cases.expected_result: "Loan approved and created successfully!" message is displayed and the new loan account details are shown.

test_cases.title: Request an Auto loan with valid inputs
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Select Loan Type = Auto and fill all required fields (Loan Amount within auto range, Down Payment at or above minimum percentage but less than Loan Amount, select Collateral Account with sufficient funds, choose Interest rate)
Click "Submit Loan Request"
test_cases.expected_result: "Loan approved and created successfully!" message is displayed and the new loan account details are shown.

test_cases.title: Request a Home loan with valid inputs
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Select Loan Type = Home and fill all required fields (Loan Amount within home range, Down Payment at or above minimum percentage but less than Loan Amount, select Collateral Account with sufficient funds, choose Interest rate)
Click "Submit Loan Request"
test_cases.expected_result: "Loan approved and created successfully!" message is displayed and the new loan account details are shown.

test_cases.title: Reject request when Down Payment is equal to or greater than Loan Amount
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Select a Loan Type and fill all other required fields, set Down Payment equal to or greater than the Loan Amount
Click "Submit Loan Request"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Down Payment must be less than Loan Amount.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Down payment < loan amount

test_cases.title: Reject request when Down Payment is below minimum percentage
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Select a Loan Type and fill all other required fields, set Down Payment below the minimum required percentage
Click "Submit Loan Request"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Down Payment does not meet the minimum percentage requirement.
test_cases.spec_evidence: 10% minimum down payment requirement

test_cases.title: Deny loan when collateral value is inadequate relative to loan
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Select a Loan Type and fill all required fields, choose a Collateral Account whose available value results in collateral value below required threshold
Click "Submit Loan Request"
test_cases.expected_result: Loan denial with message indicating inadequate collateral value.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Inadequate collateral value.

test_cases.title: Reject request when selected Collateral Account lacks sufficient funds
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Select a Loan Type and fill all other required fields, select Collateral Account with insufficient funds for the required collateral percentage
Click "Submit Loan Request"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error or denial indicating insufficient collateral funds.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Sufficient collateral funds

test_cases.title: Reject Personal loan request when Loan Amount is below allowed minimum
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Select Loan Type = Personal and fill all other required fields, set Loan Amount below the Personal minimum
Click "Submit Loan Request"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Loan Amount is outside the allowed Personal range.

test_cases.title: Reject Auto loan request when Loan Amount is above allowed maximum
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Select Loan Type = Auto and fill all other required fields, set Loan Amount above the Auto maximum
Click "Submit Loan Request"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Loan Amount is outside the allowed Auto range.

test_cases.title: Verify no actual balance debits occur after loan creation
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in, Request Loan page is open, and a valid loan request is ready to submit.
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values and note the displayed Collateral Account balance
Click "Submit Loan Request"
test_cases.expected_result: Loan is created and the collateral account balance remains unchanged (no actual balance debits occur).

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: Request Loan page is open.
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Submit Loan Request"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: System validates amount ranges

test_cases.title: Handle credit engine denial (Insufficient credit history) for an otherwise valid request
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values that otherwise meet collateral and down payment rules
Click "Submit Loan Request"
test_cases.expected_result: Loan denial with a specific reason such as "Insufficient credit history" displayed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Insufficient credit history

test_cases.title: Accept Personal loan request when Loan Amount equals the Personal minimum
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Select Loan Type = Personal and fill all required fields, set Loan Amount exactly at the Personal minimum and set Down Payment to a valid percentage
Click "Submit Loan Request"
test_cases.expected_result: Loan request is processed and may be approved; amount is accepted as within allowed Personal range.

test_cases.title: Accept Home loan request when Loan Amount equals the Home maximum
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Request Loan page is open.
steps: Select Loan Type = Home and fill all required fields, set Loan Amount exactly at the Home maximum and set Down Payment to a valid percentage
Click "Submit Loan Request"
test_cases.expected_result: Loan request is processed and may be approved; amount is accepted as within allowed Home range.

test_cases.title: Update profile with all valid contact fields
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Update Contact Info page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields (First Name, Last Name, Street Address, City, State, ZIP Code, Phone Number) with valid values
Click "Update Profile"
test_cases.expected_result: Profile updated successfully and the displayed contact fields are refreshed to show the new values.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Update Contact Info page is open.
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Update Profile"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields and invalid fields are highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: First Name is required

test_cases.title: Submit with invalid ZIP Code format
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Update Contact Info page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values except enter an invalid format in ZIP Code
Click "Update Profile"
test_cases.expected_result: ZIP Code field is highlighted and an inline error banner is displayed indicating format validation failure.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Each entry must meet format validation

test_cases.title: Submit with invalid Phone Number format
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Update Contact Info page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values except enter an invalid format in Phone Number
Click "Update Profile"
test_cases.expected_result: Phone Number field is highlighted and an inline error banner is displayed indicating format validation failure.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Each entry must meet format validation

test_cases.title: Submit with multiple fields failing format validation
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Update Contact Info page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields, but enter invalid formats for ZIP Code and Phone Number
Click "Update Profile"
test_cases.expected_result: Both invalid fields are highlighted and an inline error banner is displayed summarizing the failures.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Failures display an inline error banner

test_cases.title: Request a new Debit card with valid linked account and complete shipping address
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and the Request Card form is visible
steps: Select Card Type as Debit
Select a linked account in good standing
Fill the complete Shipping Address
Click "Request Card"
test_cases.expected_result: A card-request ticket is opened and the UI shows "Card request submitted successfully." with a tracking ID

test_cases.title: Request a new Credit card with valid linked account and complete shipping address
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and the Request Card form is visible
steps: Select Card Type as Credit
Select a linked account in good standing
Fill the complete Shipping Address
Click "Request Card"
test_cases.expected_result: A card-request ticket is opened and the UI shows "Card request submitted successfully." with a tracking ID

test_cases.title: Update spending limit with a valid amount
test_cases.preconditions: An existing card is selected and the Update Controls form is open.
steps: Fill all required fields (Select Existing Card, New Spending Limit with a valid numeric amount, Card Status as desired) and leave Travel Notice empty
Click "Update Controls"
test_cases.expected_result: "Card controls updated successfully." is displayed and the spending limit shown in the controls reflects the new amount.

test_cases.title: Freeze an active card by updating Card Status
test_cases.preconditions: An existing card currently in Active status is selected and the Update Controls form is open.
steps: Select Frozen in Card Status and fill all other required fields (Select Existing Card, any required numeric fields)
Click "Update Controls"
test_cases.expected_result: "Card controls updated successfully." is displayed and the card status updates to Frozen.

test_cases.title: Reject spending limit above allowed policy
test_cases.preconditions: The Update Controls form is open and an existing card is selected.
steps: Fill all required fields (Select Existing Card, New Spending Limit with an amount above the allowed policy, Card Status as desired)
Click "Update Controls"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error indicates the spending limit exceeds policy and the form remains editable; update is not applied.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Validation failures can occur for a limit above policy (example)

test_cases.title: Add a travel notice with valid dates and destination
test_cases.preconditions: An existing card is selected and the Update Controls form is open.
steps: Fill all required fields (Select Existing Card, Card Status as desired) and fill Travel Notice with a valid start date, end date, and destination
Click "Update Controls"
test_cases.expected_result: "Card controls updated successfully." is displayed and the travel notice (dates and destination) is saved and shown in the controls.

test_cases.title: Update controls without adding a travel notice (travel notice optional)
test_cases.preconditions: An existing card is selected and the Update Controls form is open.
steps: Fill all required fields (Select Existing Card, New Spending Limit or leave unchanged, Card Status as desired) and leave all Travel Notice fields empty
Click "Update Controls"
test_cases.expected_result: "Card controls updated successfully." is displayed and the update succeeds without a travel notice.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and the Request Card form is visible
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Request Card"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields and the request is not submitted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Checks that the address is complete

test_cases.title: Submit with Shipping Address empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and the Request Card form is visible
steps: Select a Card Type and select a linked account in good standing, leave Shipping Address empty
Click "Request Card"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the Shipping Address is required and the request is not submitted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Checks that the address is complete

test_cases.title: Attempt to request a card using an account not in good standing
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and the Request Card form is visible
steps: Select a Card Type
Select a linked account that is not in good standing
Fill the complete Shipping Address
Click "Request Card"
test_cases.expected_result: The system blocks submission and shows an error indicating the selected account is ineligible; no card-request ticket is opened.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Verifies the selected account’s standing

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: The Update Controls form is open.
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Update Controls"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors are shown inline for required fields and the form remains editable.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Validation failures appear inline

test_cases.title: Reject non-numeric spending limit value
test_cases.preconditions: The Update Controls form is open and an existing card is selected.
steps: Fill all required fields (Select Existing Card, New Spending Limit with a non-numeric value, Card Status as desired)
Click "Update Controls"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error indicates the spending limit must be numeric and the form remains editable.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Validates numeric limits

test_cases.title: Reject travel notice with end date before start date
test_cases.preconditions: The Update Controls form is open and an existing card is selected.
steps: Fill all required fields (Select Existing Card, Card Status as desired) and enter a Travel Notice with an end date earlier than the start date
Click "Update Controls"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error indicates the date range is invalid and the form remains editable; travel notice is not saved.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Validates date ranges

test_cases.title: Multiple simultaneous validation failures shown inline prevent update
test_cases.preconditions: The Update Controls form is open and an existing card is selected.
steps: Fill all required fields (Select Existing Card), set New Spending Limit above policy, and enter a Travel Notice with an invalid date range
Click "Update Controls"
test_cases.expected_result: Multiple inline validation errors are displayed, the form remains editable, and no changes are applied.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Validation failures appear inline, and the form stays editable (for example, a limit above policy)

test_cases.title: Submit with incomplete Shipping Address
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and the Request Card form is visible
steps: Select a Card Type and select a linked account in good standing
Fill the Shipping Address with incomplete details
Click "Request Card"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the address is incomplete and the request is not submitted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Checks that the address is complete

test_cases.title: Execute a Buy trade successfully and update holdings
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Execute Trade form is visible; customer has sufficient buying power.
steps: Fill all required fields (Action set to Buy, Fund Symbol selected via autocomplete, Quantity with a valid positive amount, Funding Account selected)
Click "Execute Trade"
Verify confirmation area displays success message and order details
test_cases.expected_result: A same-day trade is executed; confirmation displays "Trade executed successfully." with an order ID and portfolio holdings are updated.

test_cases.title: Execute a Sell trade successfully and update holdings
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Execute Trade form is visible; customer holds sufficient shares of the selected fund.
steps: Fill all required fields (Action set to Sell, Fund Symbol selected via autocomplete, Quantity within held shares, Destination Account selected)
Click "Execute Trade"
Verify confirmation area displays success message and order details
test_cases.expected_result: A same-day trade is executed; confirmation displays "Trade executed successfully." with an order ID and portfolio holdings are updated.

test_cases.title: Create recurring investment plan with Weekly frequency
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and the Create Plan form is open.
steps: Fill all required fields (Fund Symbol, Contribution Amount, Frequency, Start Date, Funding Account) with valid values and select Weekly frequency
Click "Create Plan"
test_cases.expected_result: Plan created successfully. The schedule is stored and a confirmation message "Plan created successfully." is shown.

test_cases.title: Create recurring investment plan with Monthly frequency
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and the Create Plan form is open.
steps: Fill all required fields (Fund Symbol, Contribution Amount, Frequency, Start Date, Funding Account) with valid values and select Monthly frequency
Click "Create Plan"
test_cases.expected_result: Plan created successfully. The schedule is stored and a confirmation message "Plan created successfully." is shown.

test_cases.title: Buy blocked when customer lacks sufficient buying power
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Execute Trade form is visible; customer does not have sufficient buying power for the requested buy amount.
steps: Fill all required fields for a Buy (select Fund Symbol, set Quantity that exceeds buying power, select Funding Account)
Click "Execute Trade"
test_cases.expected_result: An inline error prevents the trade and indicates insufficient buying power; no trade is executed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: the customer has sufficient buying power or share balance

test_cases.title: Sell blocked when customer lacks sufficient share balance
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Execute Trade form is visible; customer does not hold enough shares of the selected fund.
steps: Fill all required fields for a Sell (select Fund Symbol, set Quantity exceeding held shares, select Destination Account)
Click "Execute Trade"
test_cases.expected_result: An inline error prevents the trade and indicates insufficient share balance; no trade is executed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: the customer has sufficient buying power or share balance

test_cases.title: Portfolio snapshot displays current holdings and read-only values
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and the Execute Trade page is visible.
steps: Observe the portfolio snapshot panel
Verify it shows current fund holdings, market value, and unrealised gain or loss and that no editable inputs are present within the snapshot
test_cases.expected_result: Portfolio snapshot shows current fund holdings, market value, and unrealised gain or loss and is presented as read-only.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Execute Trade form is visible.
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Execute Trade"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: validation failures appear inline

test_cases.title: Attempt execute with a non-existent fund symbol
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Execute Trade form is visible.
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, enter a fund symbol that does not exist in the autocomplete
Click "Execute Trade"
test_cases.expected_result: An inline validation error indicates the fund symbol is invalid and the trade is not executed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: the symbol exists

test_cases.title: Attempt execute with zero or negative quantity
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Execute Trade form is visible.
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, set Quantity to zero or a negative number
Click "Execute Trade"
test_cases.expected_result: An inline validation error indicates quantity must be greater than zero and the trade is not executed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: quantity is greater than zero

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and the Create Plan form is open.
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Create Plan"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields; problematic fields are highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: errors highlight the problematic fields

test_cases.title: Submit with Start Date in the past
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and the Create Plan form is open.
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values except set Start Date to a past date
Click "Create Plan"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error displayed indicating invalid Start Date and the Start Date field is highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Start date must be in the future

test_cases.title: Submit with Contribution Amount below minimum
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and the Create Plan form is open.
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values but set Contribution Amount below the required minimum
Click "Create Plan"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown for Contribution Amount and the field is highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: the contribution meets the minimum

test_cases.title: Submit with Funding Account lacking sufficient balance
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and the Create Plan form is open.
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values but select a Funding Account with insufficient balance
Click "Create Plan"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating insufficient funds and the Funding Account field is highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: the funding account has adequate balance

test_cases.title: Portfolio snapshot enforces read-only behavior when interacting with holdings
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and the Execute Trade page is visible.
steps: Attempt to edit a value or field within the portfolio snapshot panel (e.g., click to enter edit mode or type into a displayed holding)
Observe the UI behavior
test_cases.expected_result: The portfolio snapshot cannot be edited and no changes are accepted in the snapshot panel.
test_cases.spec_evidence: portfolio snapshot is read-only

test_cases.title: Submit with Start Date set to today (not a future date)
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and the Create Plan form is open.
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values but set Start Date to today's date
Click "Create Plan"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error displayed stating the Start Date must be in the future and the Start Date field is highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Start date must be in the future

test_cases.title: Generate statement using month-and-year period
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Account Statements page with the form visible.
steps: Select Statement Period as a month-and-year
Select Account from the Account dropdown
Click "Generate Statement"
test_cases.expected_result: Displays 'Statement generated successfully.' and the generated statement shows the retrieved transactions for the selected month.

test_cases.title: Generate statement using custom date range
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Account Statements page with the form visible.
steps: Select Statement Period as custom date range and enter a valid start date and end date
Select Account from the Account dropdown
Click "Generate Statement"
test_cases.expected_result: Displays 'Statement generated successfully.' and the generated statement shows the retrieved transactions for the specified date range.

test_cases.title: Save e-Statement preference with a valid email
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Account Statements page.
steps: Check the paperless statements checkbox and fill a valid email address in the Email Address field
Click "Save Preference"
test_cases.expected_result: Displays 'e-Statement preference updated.' and the paperless preference is saved (checkbox remains selected and the entered email is shown).

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Account Statements page with the form visible.
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Generate Statement"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates the dates

test_cases.title: Failing generation shows failure message
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Account Statements page with the form visible.
steps: Fill Statement Period with a valid month-or-date-range and select an Account
Click "Generate Statement"
test_cases.expected_result: Shows 'Unable to generate statement — please try again later.' when generation fails.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Unable to generate statement — please try again later.

test_cases.title: Prevent generation when custom start date is after end date
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Account Statements page with the form visible.
steps: Select Statement Period as custom date range and enter a start date that is after the end date
Select Account from the Account dropdown
Click "Generate Statement"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown indicating the date range is invalid and statement is not generated.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates the dates

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Account Statements page.
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Save Preference"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates the email address

test_cases.title: Save preference with invalid email format
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Account Statements page.
steps: Check the paperless statements checkbox and fill an invalid email address in the Email Address field
Click "Save Preference"
test_cases.expected_result: Email field is highlighted with guidance and the preference is not saved.
test_cases.spec_evidence: highlights the email field with guidance

test_cases.title: Change password with valid current and strong matching new password
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Security Settings > Change Password panel is open
steps: Expand the Change Password panel if collapsed
Fill all required fields (Current Password: valid current password, New Password: valid strong password, Confirm New Password: same as New Password)
Click "Change Password"
test_cases.expected_result: Password changed successfully and credentials are updated.

test_cases.title: Reject change when current password is incorrect
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Security Settings > Change Password panel is open
steps: Fill all required fields (Current Password: incorrect value, New Password: valid strong password, Confirm New Password: same as New Password)
Click "Change Password"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicates the current password is incorrect and credentials are not updated.
test_cases.spec_evidence: System verifies the current password

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Security Settings > Change Password panel is open
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Change Password"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Validation errors highlight the appropriate fields

test_cases.title: Reject change when New Password and Confirm New Password do not match
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Security Settings > Change Password panel is open
steps: Fill all required fields (Current Password: valid current password, New Password: valid strong password, Confirm New Password: different value)
Click "Change Password"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating New Password and Confirm New Password must match.
test_cases.spec_evidence: New Password and Confirm New Password must match

test_cases.title: Reject weak new password that does not meet strength policy
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Security Settings > Change Password panel is open
steps: Fill all required fields (Current Password: valid current password, New Password: weak password that fails policy, Confirm New Password: same weak password)
Click "Change Password"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the new password does not meet the strong-password requirements.
test_cases.spec_evidence: System enforces a strong-password policy

test_cases.title: Change password using a minimally-compliant strong password
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Security Settings > Change Password panel is open
steps: Fill all required fields (Current Password: valid current password, New Password: minimally-compliant strong password, Confirm New Password: same as New Password)
Click "Change Password"
test_cases.expected_result: Password changed successfully and credentials are updated.
test_cases.spec_evidence: System enforces a strong-password policy

test_cases.title: Send message successfully with required fields (no attachment)

steps: Fill all required fields (Subject with a valid-length subject, Category, Message Body with valid content)
Click "Send Message"

test_cases.title: Send message successfully with a valid attachment

steps: Fill all required fields (Subject with a valid-length subject, Category, Message Body with valid content) and attach a supported file type
Click "Send Message"
test_cases.expected_result: A success notification "Message sent successfully." is displayed and a ticket ID is shown

test_cases.title: Submit Request Callback with valid inputs
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Request Callback form is displayed
steps: Fill all required fields (select Reason for Call, choose a valid Preferred Date at least the next business day, choose a Preferred Time Window, verify or edit Phone Number to a valid format)
Click "Request Callback"
test_cases.expected_result: A success message "Callback request submitted." is displayed and an email confirmation is sent.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and the Support Center Send Message form is visible
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Send Message"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.

test_cases.title: Submit with Message Body empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and the Support Center Send Message form is visible
steps: Fill all other required fields (Subject, Category), leave Message Body empty
Click "Send Message"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error indicating Message Body is required is displayed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Message Body is required

test_cases.title: Submit with Subject exceeding allowed length
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and the Support Center Send Message form is visible
steps: Fill all required fields (Subject exceeding allowed length, Category, Message Body with valid content)
Click "Send Message"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation guidance is shown for Subject length and the message is not sent.

test_cases.title: Submit with unsupported attachment type
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and the Support Center Send Message form is visible

Click "Send Message"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation guidance about the attachment type is displayed and the message is not sent.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Request Callback form is displayed
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Request Callback"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown inline for the required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Validation errors are shown inline

test_cases.title: Submit with Preferred Date earlier than allowed
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Request Callback form is displayed
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, set Preferred Date to a date earlier than the next business day
Click "Request Callback"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error shown indicating the Preferred Date is invalid and request is not submitted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Preferred Date must be at least the next business day

test_cases.title: Submit with Preferred Date set to the next business day (boundary)
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Request Callback form is displayed
steps: Fill all required fields (select Reason for Call, set Preferred Date to the next business day, choose a Preferred Time Window, ensure Phone Number is valid)
Click "Request Callback"
test_cases.expected_result: Request is accepted and a success message "Callback request submitted." is displayed; an email confirmation is sent.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Preferred Date must be at least the next business day
